channel.title: CyberPulse
channel.description: Executive cyber intelligence briefings on cyber risk, AI threats, infrastructure exposure, and board-level decision-making.

item.title: CyberPulse Daily — The Credential Float
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: CyberPulse Daily Brief for Gulf enterprise security teams: credential liquidity, active exploitation, infostealer disruption, firewall harvesting, CI/CD exposure, and agentic browser risk.
